title: Nutty Crumbly White Chocolate Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly Nutty Crumbly White Chocolate Stir-fry is a solo-dinner Brazilian dish featuring white chocolate and nuts for a perfect balance of textures and flavors.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (180°C). Toast the almonds and pecans in a dry skillet over medium heat for about 2-3 minutes until fragrant. Let them cool completely before chopping finely.
In a small saucepan, melt the white chocolate using low heat and stirring occasionally until smooth. Remove from heat immediately to avoid burning.
Heat up some olive oil in a pan on medium-high heat. Add minced ginger and cook for 30 seconds, allowing it to soften slightly but not burn.
Add the melted white chocolate into the pan with ginger. Stir well and then add the toasted almonds and pecans. Cook for about 1-2 minutes until everything is fully combined and heated through.
Season with salt and chili flakes to taste. Serve warm as a light meal or dessert.
